title: Basic JavaScript Data Table
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Data Table. Focus on implementing Table rendering correctly.

description: Create a function that uses Table rendering and Column sorting together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Data Table Project
description: Build a small application that applies Table rendering, Column sorting, Row filtering in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

description: The following code has bugs related to Table rendering. Find and fix them.

description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Table rendering and Column sorting.
